checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Three bounded live claude -p slices (status, tests, docs) executed under the serious_live_multi_slice_no_remediation standard with 2.00 USD budget caps, ascii_stable_bounded_240_chars diagnostics, and the max-1-retry rule enforced. Each slice used exactly one retry; no slice reached the two-failure block condition.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: Runtime summaries report summary_count 3, ready_count 3, blocked_count 0, policy_gate_ready_rate 1. status slice emits max_live_retry_per_slice and pilot_block_rule; tests slice asserts both plus coordinator_remediation_allowed false; docs slice recorded the live execution section.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No production, secrets, billing, auth, authorization, database, dependency installation, deployment, or CI/CD security changes. Issue #194 untouched, still excluded as not_planned by the operator decision registry. No external API calls beyond authorized GitHub operations.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Executors restricted to Read/Write/Edit tools, acceptEdits permission mode, budget-capped, no session persistence. Diagnostics redacted and bounded to 240 ASCII chars. No protected files in any slice exclusive_write.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Slice product diffs are minimal and inside declared exclusive_write: scripts/lib/status.ps1 (+2/-1), scripts/test-specbridge-cli.ps1 (+3/-1), docs/specbridge-v5-serious-pilot-status.md (+16). git history shows zero coordinator-authored edits to these files; coordinator changes were limited to launch plans, packets metadata, preflight, and evidence artifacts.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The tests slice added deterministic fieldCheck assertions for max_live_retry_per_slice and pilot_block_rule next to the pre-existing coordinator_remediation_allowed assertion. Full smoke (30 scripts) passing is the PR gate; all 8 runtime validators pass on the recorded artifacts.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Foundation Validation (full smoke), review gate, PR review report and Claude review run on the PR; merge is blocked until all pass per CI authority standard.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records every attempt failure with its real cause (budget exceeded from full-file rewrite, clean executor self-block on tooling constraint, operator plan session limit), the retry count per slice, the coordinator's config-only interventions, and the unresolved risk that prepare-runtime-launch defaults to a tool list without Edit.

findings.evidence: prepare-runtime-launch and preflight default AllowedTool to Read,Write. Without Edit, executors must rewrite whole files, which exceeded the status slice budget and forced the tests executor to self-block on its first attempt.
findings.recommendation: Change the default AllowedTool to Edit,Read,Write in a dedicated runner-hardening task; both commands already approve Edit when passed explicitly.

findings.evidence: The tests executor stopped cleanly with a written remediation plan instead of risking a mid-write budget death, and the retry applied that plan verbatim. This is the intended no-remediation behavior working end to end.
findings.recommendation: Capture this evidence pattern as the reference example in future executor prompt sections.

findings.evidence: The docs slice first attempt failed on the operator plan session limit, an environment constraint outside the protocol; the deliverable was already complete and the retry confirmed it without duplication.
findings.recommendation: Schedule live pilots away from plan limit reset windows, or detect the limit message and defer the launch instead of consuming an attempt.

unresolved_risks: prepare-runtime-launch default tool list lacks Edit; fixed per-launch here, default still pending a runner-hardening task.
Operator plan session limits can consume live retry attempts for environmental reasons.
Retries doubled the live execution count (5 runs against a 3-run baseline) within the per-slice budget cap.
